scenarios.title: Traffic Stop De-escalation
scenarios.description: Learn to handle a tense traffic stop with an agitated driver

scenarios.title: Hostel Noise Complaint Negotiation
scenarios.description: Learn to negotiate a peaceful resolution during a late-night noise complaint at a busy city hostel

scenarios.title: Youth Interaction
scenarios.description: Build trust with teenagers in a community setting

scenarios.title: Mental Health Crisis
scenarios.description: Assist someone experiencing a mental health crisis with compassion

scenarios.title: Noise Complaint
scenarios.description: Handle a neighborhood noise complaint diplomatically

scenarios.title: Market Dispute — Negotiating Calmly
scenarios.description: A disagreement over a parking space at a weekend market has drawn attention. Use clear communication and mild negotiation to resolve the dispute quickly

scenarios.title: Nightclub Street Fracas
scenarios.description: A heated altercation has spilled from a nightclub onto a busy street. Communicate clearly in a high-pressure environment and prevent escalation

scenarios.title: Domestic Dispute — Mental Health Crisis and Child Present
scenarios.description: Advanced scenario: a high-stress domestic dispute with a mental health crisis and a young child present. Master de-escalation and crisis intervention while ensuring child safety.

scenarios.title: Custody Exchange — Between Two Fires
scenarios.description: Advanced scenario: de-escalation and neutral mediation during a high-conflict child custody exchange between hostile divorced parents. A distressed child is present.

scenarios.title: Hospital Disturbance — Pain, Fear, and Aggression
scenarios.description: Advanced scenario: de-escalate with an aggressive patient in a hospital emergency department. Collaborate with medical staff while protecting everyone's safety.

scenarios.title: Road Rage — Intersection Flashpoint
scenarios.description: Advanced scenario: two drivers in a heated confrontation after a traffic collision. Secure the scene, separate hostile parties, protect a child present, and manage competing demands.

scenarios.title: Street Vendor Dispute — Community Crossfire
scenarios.description: Advanced scenario: unauthorized street vendor, frustrated shop owner, and filming crowd. Balance enforcement, procedural justice, and community relations.

scenarios.title: Traffic Stop — Escalation and Communication
scenarios.description: Advanced scenario: a driver stopped for speeding becomes defensive. Practice de-escalation and professional communication; how you conduct the stop shapes trust and complaint risk.

scenarios.title: Youth in the Park — Music, Conflict, and De-escalation
scenarios.description: Advanced scenario: loud music and verbal conflict among teenagers in a city park. Practice de-escalation, transparency, and working with emotions.
